description: LLM phrasing of deterministic preflight findings. The set of findings and which checks failed are decided deterministically; you only phrase severity, a title, and a recommendation for each supplied finding. Do not add, remove, or re-classify findings.

issues.description: One entry per supplied finding, in any order, each echoing its checkKey.

checkKey.description: The finding's check key, echoed back exactly (e.g. font_embedding).

severity.description: Severity, consistent with the deterministic result (FAIL=HIGH/MEDIUM, REVIEW=MEDIUM/LOW).

title.description: A short, human-readable issue title (a few words).

recommendation.description: A concrete, actionable fix recommendation for the QA reviewer / designer.
